_comment: Copy this file to data/mirror.json (same folder) after deploying your Cloudflare mirror. When present, the launcher downloads both disk images and savestates through your mirror by default — the Worker adds the browser fingerprint (and disk ?k= signing token) the official hosts' WAF requires. Point both keys at your Worker. Environment variables (PCF_MIRROR / PCF_DISKS_BASE / PCF_ORIGIN_BASE) still override it.
